name: calabash shaping tool
functional_purpose: shape the dough into a calabash-like form

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a flat, long, and thin rectangular base
construction_steps.reason: the base will provide a stable platform for shaping the dough

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a semi-circular, curved, and tapered shape on top of the base
construction_steps.reason: the curved shape will help shape the dough into a calabash-like form

construction_steps.Instruction: Add a short, flat, and wide handle
construction_steps.reason: the handle will make it easier for the robot to hold the tool
